overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a dystopian urban street at dusk. The scene features wet pavement reflecting neon lights, palm trees lining the sidewalk, an elevated highway overpass, and light vehicle traffic passing by.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with palm trees and utility poles

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk following a small group of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead of ego toward the overpass

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining both sides of the street
wooden utility poles with multiple crossbars and wires
large elevated concrete highway overpass spanning the street ahead
wet concrete sidewalk reflecting the ambient light
low-rise buildings covered in colorful graffiti and murals

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dystopian city street at dusk, with the camera following a character walking along a wet sidewalk. Palm trees and utility poles line the path while an elevated highway overpass looms in the distance. A few pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction, and the buildings show heavy graffiti.

events.description: character steps off the sidewalk and begins crossing the asphalt street
large black van passes by closely on the right side

agents.ego_description: crossing the street while watching for vehicles, then stepping onto the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: black van with headlights on driving past the crossing character

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard with purple and pink neon advertisement featuring a face
dark asphalt road surface with yellow dividing lines

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the asphalt street, moving from the initial sidewalk to the opposite side. A large black van passes closely by on the right. A prominent neon billboard becomes visible on the left, and the overpass structure grows larger as the character approaches.

events.description: character walks under the overpass, entering the semi-covered area beneath the highway

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk beneath the overpass, passing trash bins and debris on the right

entered.detail: massive concrete pillars and deck of the elevated highway with lights underneath
green dumpsters and scattered trash bags along the sidewalk curb

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the massive concrete overpass, the scene becomes more enclosed and industrial. Trash bins and debris line the right side of the sidewalk. The neon billboard recedes into the background while the concrete pillars of the highway dominate the view overhead.

events.description: character approaches traffic light showing red signals overhead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk toward an intersection, passing a pedestrian with blue hair

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with bright blue hair and white cap walking toward and passing the camera

entered.detail: overhead traffic signal structure showing red lights

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from under the overpass and approaches a traffic intersection. The overpass recedes to the left as traffic lights become visible ahead. A pedestrian with distinctive blue hair and a white cap walks past the camera, and vehicles continue to move along the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dystopian city street at dusk that transitions from an open sidewalk into a claustrophobic industrial underpass before emerging at a busy intersection. It begins by following a character along a wet, graffiti-covered sidewalk lined with palm trees and utility poles, moving toward a looming highway overpass. As the character crosses the asphalt street, a large black van passes by and a prominent neon billboard comes into view, while the overpass structure grows larger and more imposing. The scene then shifts into a more enclosed environment as the camera moves beneath the massive concrete pillars of the highway, passing trash bins and debris. Finally, the character emerges from the shadow of the overpass toward a traffic intersection, where the concrete structure recedes to the left and a pedestrian with blue hair and a white cap walks past.
